response.global_analysis: 1. Scene 2 Lyrics Match: Discarded Scene 2 reference lyrics because the vocal musical performance does not begin in this specific video segment; the video ends during the instrumental/chanting stage transition. 2. Transcription Scope: Manually transcribed the entire MC/safety guidelines segment from 00:01 to 02:59, including cross-talk and stumbles between Ina and Kiara. 3. Visual Text: Subtitled the prominent on-screen concert title 'DRAWN TO DAWN' during the transition.

subtitles.original: Good morning, afternoon, evening, everyone!
subtitles.english: Good morning, afternoon, evening, everyone!

subtitles.original: This is Ninomae Ina'nis!
subtitles.english: This is Ninomae Ina'nis!

subtitles.original: That's right, it is finally time to start Day 2!
subtitles.english: That's right, it is finally time to start Day 2!

subtitles.original: Is everyone hyped?!
subtitles.english: Is everyone hyped?!

subtitles.original: Hype, hype, hype, hype!
subtitles.english: Hype, hype, hype, hype!

subtitles.original: All right, before we kick things off, of course, we have some important safety rules and house guidelines to go over.
subtitles.english: All right, before we kick things off, of course, we have some important safety rules and house guidelines to go over.

subtitles.original: First, photography and the use of recording equipment are strictly prohibited during the performance.
subtitles.english: First, photography and the use of recording equipment are strictly prohibited during the performance.

subtitles.original: However, if you are watching from home, screenshots are allowed. Please take lots of screenshots!
subtitles.english: However, if you are watching from home, screenshots are allowed. Please take lots of screenshots!

subtitles.original: Yeah, スクショはOKですよ！
subtitles.english: Yeah, screenshots are OK!

subtitles.original: Also, the venue is smoke-free, so please refrain from smoking inside.
subtitles.english: Also, the venue is smoke-free, so please refrain from smoking inside.

subtitles.original: Unless you're smoking hot like me!
subtitles.english: Unless you're smoking hot like me!

subtitles.original: We heard that yesterday...
subtitles.english: We heard that yesterday...

subtitles.original: We said that yesterday.
subtitles.english: We said that yesterday.

subtitles.original: If you start feeling unwell—
subtitles.english: If you start feeling unwell—

subtitles.original: And... unfeeling well...?
subtitles.english: And... unfeeling well...?

subtitles.original: If you start feeling unwell at any point, please don't push yourself.
subtitles.english: If you start feeling unwell at any point, please don't push yourself.

subtitles.original: Just reach out to the nearest staff member for help,
subtitles.english: Just reach out to the nearest staff member for help,

subtitles.original: and drink water!
subtitles.english: and drink water!

subtitles.original: For everyone's safety, please avoid any dangerous or disruptive behavior.
subtitles.english: For everyone's safety, please avoid any dangerous or disruptive behavior.

subtitles.original: This, once again, no matter how hype it is, includes moshing, diving,
subtitles.english: This, once again, no matter how hype it is, includes moshing, diving,

subtitles.original: sitting on shoulders, jumping excessively, or throwing objects toward the stage.
subtitles.english: sitting on shoulders, jumping excessively, or throwing objects toward the stage.

subtitles.original: Climbing onto the stage, intentionally blocking the aisles, or rushing toward the front is also not allowed.
subtitles.english: Climbing onto the stage, intentionally blocking the aisles, or rushing toward the front is also not allowed.

subtitles.original: Please refrain from disruptive shouting, erratic lightstick movements,
subtitles.english: Please refrain from disruptive shouting, erratic lightstick movements,

subtitles.original: or any extreme motions that might interfere with the experience of those around you.
subtitles.english: or any extreme motions that might interfere with the experience of those around you.

subtitles.original: Be considerate!
subtitles.english: Be considerate!

subtitles.original: If you don't follow the instructions of our staff or the venue staff, you may be asked to leave the venue.
subtitles.english: If you don't follow the instructions of our staff or the venue staff, you may be asked to leave the venue.

subtitles.original: Yeah, please keep in mind that the venue, organizers, performers,
subtitles.english: Yeah, please keep in mind that the venue, organizers, performers,

subtitles.original: and staff cannot be held responsible for any accidents,
subtitles.english: and staff cannot be held responsible for any accidents,

subtitles.original: equipment damage, or trouble caused to—
subtitles.english: equipment damage, or trouble caused to—

subtitles.original: ...bleh bleh bleh... caused by failing to follow instructions!
subtitles.english: ...bleh bleh bleh... caused by failing to follow instructions!

subtitles.original: So did you stumble over the same words?
subtitles.english: So did you stumble over the same words?

subtitles.original: It's hard, okay? I'm trying my best here! I can't read!
subtitles.english: It's hard, okay? I'm trying my best here! I can't read!

subtitles.original: Additionally, any costs for damage resulting from ignoring these rules will be the responsibility of the person involved.
subtitles.english: Additionally, any costs for damage resulting from ignoring these rules will be the responsibility of the person involved.

subtitles.original: There are cameras in the venue for filming and photography today, and you might appear in the footage or photos.
subtitles.english: There are cameras in the venue for filming and photography today, and you might appear in the footage or photos.

subtitles.original: These may be used for promotional purposes later on, so please keep that in mind.
subtitles.english: These may be used for promotional purposes later on, so please keep that in mind.

subtitles.original: And finally, just like yesterday, the concert will be in two parts.
subtitles.english: And finally, just like yesterday, the concert will be in two parts.

subtitles.original: There's a part for Wawa, and there's a part for me, so please look forward to both of them!
subtitles.english: There's a part for Wawa, and there's a part for me, so please look forward to both of them!

subtitles.original: Yeah.
subtitles.english: Yeah.

subtitles.original: That is it for the rules.
subtitles.english: That is it for the rules.

subtitles.original: The show is about to begin, so get ready!
subtitles.english: The show is about to begin, so get ready!

subtitles.original: Have fun!
subtitles.english: Have fun!

subtitles.original: See you soon! Bye-bye!
subtitles.english: See you soon! Bye-bye!

subtitles.original: DRAWN TO DAWN
subtitles.english: [DRAWN TO DAWN]
